negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_ebe880ee-0e7e-48ad-b0bb-14aa68497bf0
prompt: A woman with long straight dark hair, dressed in an all-black outfit including a long black coat, black boots, and a black shoulder bag, walks away from a police station. She is filmed in the center of the scene in a wide shot at eye level. Her hair blows gently, and her expression is serious. She is looking off-screen to the left at the beginning of the video. As she walks, she looks straight ahead toward the right side of the scene. She holds a mobile phone in her right hand and gestures with her left hand. The two people approach the building on either side of the scene. She looks down at the smartphone in her hand and maintains a steady stride, looking at her phone throughout her movement. Her posture remains upright, and she glances upwards and looks around with a look of concern on her face. The two people attempt to go up a stone staircase on either side of the building as a third person exits the building and begins to go down the right-hand side. In the background, a large building with a sign in a foreign language indicating it is a police station is visible. A white police car in front of the building faces the camera. The building has a simple structure, painted burnt-red walls with cream molding, a slanted grey roof that is partially visible, and windows along the facade. Two uniformed police officers are stationed at the entrance, which is elevated, standing on either side of the doorway. On the far right of the scene, next to the building, are trees and shrubbery. The camera's movements are random throughout the video, and the film ends in a medium shot of the woman who looks down off-camera toward the center of the scene, holding the phone in both hands. The setting is an overcast day with soft shadows on the ground.
